title: AMRU Date Sheet 2025 @ amruhp.ac.in

detail.title: AMRU Date Sheet 2025 @ amruhp.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of AMRU have released the AMRU Date Sheet 2025 for B.Sc. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: AMRU Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Atal Medical and Research University has released the B.Sc. Students can access their AMRU Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here. For further updates on AMRU, candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: How to Download the AMRU Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Atal Medical and Research University Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

rows: Date sheet for B.Sc. (Paramedical) 3rd year Annual examinations to be held in November, 2025
Date sheet for B.Sc. (Paramedical) 2nd year Annual examinations to be held in November, 2025
Date sheet for B.Sc. (Paramedical) 1st year Annual examinations to be held in November, 2025
